revision.comment: O.K. Then let's include a more detailed description for clarity.
revision.text:
{| class="messagebox" |- | [[Image:Red x.png|30px]] | '''This Wikipedia page is currently inactive and is retained primarily for historical interest. Per [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines]]:''' ''"A historical page is any proposal for which consensus is unclear, where discussion has died out for whatever reason. Historical pages also include any process no longer in use, or any non-recent log of any process. Historical pages can be revived by advertising them. "'' '''
If you want to revive discussion regarding the subject, you should seek broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|village pump]]. | {{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{shortcut|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}} }} }} |}{{{category|[[Category:Wikipedia archives|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}} ---- To include a shortcut, pass a parameter: {{{{PAGENAME}}|[[WP:SHORT]]}}. revision.comment: Should not cite a policy page as if it were a legal statute
revision.text:
{| class="messagebox" |- | [[Image:Red x.png|30px]] | '''This Wikipedia page is currently inactive and is retained primarily for historical interest.''' A historical page is any proposal for which consensus is unclear, where discussion has died out for whatever reason. Historical pages also include any process no longer in use, or any non-recent log of any process. Historical pages can be revived by advertising them.
If you want to revive discussion regarding the subject, you should seek broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|village pump]]. | {{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{shortcut|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}} }} }} |}{{{category|[[Category:Inactive project pages|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}} ---- To include a shortcut, pass a parameter: {{{{PAGENAME}}|[[WP:SHORT]]}}. revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/207.190.226.22|207.190.226.22]] ([[User talk:207.190.226.22|talk]]) to last version by David Levy
Fixed grammar! Slight link move, no change in meaning.
converted to {{[[Template:Ombox|ombox]]}}; removed alt symbol; switched to dedicated shortcut box to enable changes to the original without affecting this template
"A historic" is more common than "an historic" is, but we can easily avoid this issue entirely.

revision.comment: add paramater last for last updated
uncategorize user and user talk pages
Robot - Removing category Category suppression-supporting templates per [[WP:CFD|CFD]] at [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2009 October 31]].
changed categories --> category per issue raised on talk
Restore red "x" image. It's important to be clear that these proposals were rejected. Barnstar association doesn't make sense
Undid revision 382487455 by [[Special:Contributions/IronGargoyle|IronGargoyle]] ([[User talk:IronGargoyle|talk]]) talk page please
switching to standard filing cabinet icon for now
Tweaks/partial reversion: 1. There is talkspace use [and code to accommodate it]. 2. We set a fixed 30px width for text alignment when multiple templates are stacked.
Because none is called for in that instance.
Switched to {{ROOTPAGENAME}} for user subpages, as {{BASEPAGENAME}} doesn't work right for subpages of subpages
add "wound-up" parameter per deletion of [[:Template:Closed down]]

Changed protection level for "[[Template:Historical]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]], 20000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))

revision.text:
{{pp-template|small=yes}}{{mbox | type = notice | image = [[File:Historical.svg|30px|alt=|link=]] | imageright = {{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{Ombox/shortcut|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}} }} }} | text = {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}|User|User talk='''This user {{#ifeq:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{PAGENAME}}||sub}}page is currently inactive and is retained for ''historical'' reference.''' {{#if: {{{last|}}}|It was last updated {{{last}}}.}}
If you want to revive discussion regarding the subject, you might try contacting [[User talk:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}|the user in question]] or seeking broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|village pump]].|#default={{#switch:{{{type}}}|policy='''This former [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines|Wikipedia policy]], no longer backed by community consensus, is retained for historical reference.'''|guideline='''This former [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines|Wikipedia guideline]], no longer backed by community consensus, is retained for historical reference.'''| |section='''This section is currently inactive and is retained for [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines#historical|historical]] reference. '''{{#if: {{{brief|}}}||Either the page is no longer relevant or consensus on its purpose has become unclear. To revive discussion, seek broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|village pump]].}} |woundup='''This page has been closed down by [[Wikipedia:Consensus|community consensus]], and is retained only for [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines#historical|historical]] reference.''' If you wish to restart discussion on the status of this page, seek community input at a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump|village pump]].|#default='''This page is currently inactive and is retained for [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines#historical|historical]] reference. '''{{#if: {{{brief|}}}||Either the page is no longer relevant or consensus on its purpose has become unclear. To revive discussion, seek broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|village pump]].}}}} {{#if: {{{comment|}}}|{{{comment}}}|}} {{#if: {{{last|}}}|It was last updated {{{last}}}.}} }} }}{{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}|User|User talk=|#default={{#ifeq:{{{category}}}|no||[[Category:Inactive project pages|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: sync from sandbox to add line breaks and font-size: 90% per request from [[User:UpsandDowns1234|UpsandDowns1234]]
fix comment/last not working on user/usertalk pages
categorize pages where type=section [[Category:Inactive project page sections]]
remove "|section=", which was boldly added on 15 June 2016‎, is not documented, and is not used anywhere – this template populates [[Category:Inactive project pages]], not page-sections.
the date alias for last was only in the top half
add param. aliases that people may expect through familiarity with other templates about deprecation or closure
add database report option per tper
Add __EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__ to exclude Template-space pages from [[Special:UnusedTemplates]] (see Tech News: 2024-36)
per edit request on talk page - include line break

revision.comment: O.K. Then let's include a more detailed description for clarity.
revision.text:
{| class="messagebox" |- | [[Image:Red x.png|30px]] | '''This Wikipedia page is currently inactive and is retained primarily for historical interest. Per [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines]]:''' ''"A historical page is any proposal for which consensus is unclear, where discussion has died out for whatever reason. Historical pages also include any process no longer in use, or any non-recent log of any process. Historical pages can be revived by advertising them. "'' '''
If you want to revive discussion regarding the subject, you should seek broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|village pump]]. | {{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{shortcut|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}} }} }} |}{{{category|[[Category:Wikipedia archives|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}} ---- To include a shortcut, pass a parameter: {{{{PAGENAME}}|[[WP:SHORT]]}}. This usually means that no consensus was achieved, or it is no longer relevant or maintained (see the [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines#historical|policy definition]]). If you want to revive discussion regarding the subject, you should seek broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|proposal discussion page]]. | {{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{shortcut|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}} }} }} |}{{{category|[[Category:Inactive project pages|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}} ---- To include a shortcut, pass a parameter: {{{{PAGENAME}}|[[WP:SHORT]]}}. For related [[:Category:Wikipedia header templates|Wikipedia header templates]] see [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Project namespace|Template messages/Project namespace]]. For a similar template for use in userspace, see {{tl|Historical-User}}. [[Category:Wikipedia header templates|Historical]] [[ja:Template:Historical]] [[pt:Predefinição:Arquivo histórico]] [[zh:Template:Historical]]

revision.comment: Reverted. This is a project template, not an article template.
Fixed grammar! Slight link move, no change in meaning.
converted to {{[[Template:Ombox|ombox]]}}; removed alt symbol; switched to dedicated shortcut box to enable changes to the original without affecting this template
"A historic" is more common than "an historic" is, but we can easily avoid this issue entirely.

revision.text:
{{pp-semi-template|small=yes}} {{ombox |type = notice |image = [[Image:Red x.svg|30px]] |text = {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}|User|User talk='''This user {{#ifeq:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{PAGENAME}}||sub}}page is currently inactive and is retained for ''historical'' reference.'''
If you want to revive discussion regarding the subject, you might try contacting [[User talk:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|the user in question]] or seeking broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|community discussion page]].|#default='''This Wikipedia page is currently inactive and is retained for [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines#historical|historical]] reference.'''

revision.comment: add paramater last for last updated
uncategorize user and user talk pages
Robot - Removing category Category suppression-supporting templates per [[WP:CFD|CFD]] at [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2009 October 31]].
changed categories --> category per issue raised on talk
Restore red "x" image. It's important to be clear that these proposals were rejected. Barnstar association doesn't make sense
Undid revision 382487455 by [[Special:Contributions/IronGargoyle|IronGargoyle]] ([[User talk:IronGargoyle|talk]]) talk page please
switching to standard filing cabinet icon for now
Tweaks/partial reversion: 1. There is talkspace use [and code to accommodate it]. 2. We set a fixed 30px width for text alignment when multiple templates are stacked.
Switched to {{ROOTPAGENAME}} for user subpages, as {{BASEPAGENAME}} doesn't work right for subpages of subpages
add "wound-up" parameter per deletion of [[:Template:Closed down]]

revision.text:
{{pp-template|small=yes}}{{mbox | type = notice | image = [[File:Historical.svg|30px|alt=|link=]] | imageright = {{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{Ombox/shortcut|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}} }} }} | text = {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}|User|User talk='''This user {{#ifeq:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{PAGENAME}}||sub}}page is currently inactive and is retained for ''historical'' reference.''' {{#if: {{{last|}}}|It was last updated {{{last}}}.}}
If you want to revive discussion regarding the subject, you might try contacting [[User talk:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}|the user in question]] or seeking broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|village pump]].|#default={{#switch:{{{type}}}|policy='''This former [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines|Wikipedia policy]], no longer backed by community consensus, is retained for historical reference.'''|guideline='''This former [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines|Wikipedia guideline]], no longer backed by community consensus, is retained for historical reference.'''| |section='''This section is currently inactive and is retained for [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines#historical|historical]] reference. '''{{#if: {{{brief|}}}||Either the page is no longer relevant or consensus on its purpose has become unclear. To revive discussion, seek broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|village pump]].}} |woundup='''This page has been closed down by [[Wikipedia:Consensus|community consensus]], and is retained only for [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines#historical|historical]] reference.''' If you wish to restart discussion on the status of this page, seek community input at a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump|village pump]].|#default='''This page is currently inactive and is retained for [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines#historical|historical]] reference. '''{{#if: {{{brief|}}}||Either the page is no longer relevant or consensus on its purpose has become unclear. To revive discussion, seek broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|village pump]].}}}} {{#if: {{{comment|}}}|{{{comment}}}|}} {{#if: {{{last|}}}|It was last updated {{{last}}}.}} }} }}{{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}|User|User talk=|#default={{#ifeq:{{{category}}}|no||[[Category:Inactive project pages|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: /* top */ this is used more on non p/g pages...link switch ....has parameters for other pages
revision.text:
{{pp-template|small=yes}}{{mbox | type = notice | image = [[File:Historical.svg|30px|alt=|link=]] | imageright = {{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{Ombox/shortcut|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}} }} }} | text = {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}|User|User talk='''This user {{#ifeq:{{BASEPAGENAME}}|{{PAGENAME}}||sub}}page is currently inactive and is retained for ''historical'' reference.''' {{#if: {{{last|}}}|It was last updated {{{last}}}.}}
If you want to revive discussion regarding the subject, you might try contacting [[User talk:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}|the user in question]] or seeking broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|village pump]].|#default={{#switch:{{{type}}}|policy='''This former [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines|Wikipedia policy]], no longer backed by community consensus, is retained for historical reference.'''|guideline='''This former [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines|Wikipedia guideline]], no longer backed by community consensus, is retained for historical reference.'''| |section='''This section is currently inactive and is retained for [[WP:HISPAGES|historical]] reference. '''{{#if: {{{brief|}}}||Either the page is no longer relevant or consensus on its purpose has become unclear. To revive discussion, seek broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|village pump]].}} |woundup='''This page has been closed down by [[Wikipedia:Consensus|community consensus]], and is retained only for [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines#historical|historical]] reference.''' If you wish to restart discussion on the status of this page, seek community input at a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump|village pump]].|#default='''This page is currently inactive and is retained for [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines#historical|historical]] reference. '''{{#if: {{{brief|}}}||Either the page is no longer relevant or consensus on its purpose has become unclear. To revive discussion, seek broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|village pump]].}}}} {{#if: {{{comment|}}}|{{{comment}}}|}} {{#if: {{{last|}}}|It was last updated {{{last}}}.}} }} }}{{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}|User|User talk=|#default={{#ifeq:{{{category}}}|no||[[Category:Inactive project pages|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: sync from sandbox to add line breaks and font-size: 90% per request from [[User:UpsandDowns1234|UpsandDowns1234]]
fix comment/last not working on user/usertalk pages
categorize pages where type=section [[Category:Inactive project page sections]]
remove "|section=", which was boldly added on 15 June 2016‎, is not documented, and is not used anywhere – this template populates [[Category:Inactive project pages]], not page-sections.
the date alias for last was only in the top half
add param. aliases that people may expect through familiarity with other templates about deprecation or closure
add database report option per tper
Add __EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__ to exclude Template-space pages from [[Special:UnusedTemplates]] (see Tech News: 2024-36)
per edit request on talk page - include line break

revision.comment: O.K. Then let's include a more detailed description for clarity.
revision.text:
{| class="messagebox" |- | [[Image:Red x.png|30px]] | '''This Wikipedia page is currently inactive and is retained primarily for historical interest. Per [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines]]:''' ''"A historical page is any proposal for which consensus is unclear, where discussion has died out for whatever reason. Historical pages also include any process no longer in use, or any non-recent log of any process. Historical pages can be revived by advertising them. "'' '''
If you want to revive discussion regarding the subject, you should seek broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|village pump]]. | {{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{shortcut|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}} }} }} |}{{{category|[[Category:Wikipedia archives|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}} ---- To include a shortcut, pass a parameter: {{{{PAGENAME}}|[[WP:SHORT]]}}. revision.comment: Should not cite a policy page as if it were a legal statute
revision.text:
{| class="messagebox" |- | [[Image:Red x.png|30px]] | '''This Wikipedia page is currently inactive and is retained primarily for historical interest.''' A historical page is any proposal for which consensus is unclear, where discussion has died out for whatever reason. Historical pages also include any process no longer in use, or any non-recent log of any process. Historical pages can be revived by advertising them.
If you want to revive discussion regarding the subject, you should seek broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|village pump]]. | {{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{shortcut|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}} }} }} |}{{{category|[[Category:Inactive project pages|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}} ---- To include a shortcut, pass a parameter: {{{{PAGENAME}}|[[WP:SHORT]]}}. {| class="messagebox" |- | [[Image:Red x.png|30px]] | '''This Wikipedia page is currently inactive and is retained primarily for historical interest.''' A historical page is a proposal for which consensus is unclear or where discussion has died out, or a page for a process no longer in use, or a non-recent log of a process.
If you want to revive discussion regarding the subject, you should seek broader input via a forum such as the [[Wikipedia:Village pump (proposals)|village pump]]. | {{#if:{{{1|}}} | {{shortcut|{{{1|}}}|{{{2|}}}|{{{3|}}}|{{{4|}}}|{{{5|}}} }} }} |}{{{category|[[Category:Inactive project pages|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}} ---- To include a shortcut, pass a parameter: {{{{PAGENAME}}|[[WP:SHORT]]}}. revision.comment: add paramater last for last updated
uncategorize user and user talk pages
Robot - Removing category Category suppression-supporting templates per [[WP:CFD|CFD]] at [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2009 October 31]].
changed categories --> category per issue raised on talk
Restore red "x" image. It's important to be clear that these proposals were rejected. Barnstar association doesn't make sense
switching to standard filing cabinet icon for now
Tweaks/partial reversion: 1. There is talkspace use [and code to accommodate it]. 2. We set a fixed 30px width for text alignment when multiple templates are stacked.
Switched to {{ROOTPAGENAME}} for user subpages, as {{BASEPAGENAME}} doesn't work right for subpages of subpages
add "wound-up" parameter per deletion of [[:Template:Closed down]]

Changed protection level for "[[Template:Historical]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]], 20000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))

revision.comment: sync from sandbox to add line breaks and font-size: 90% per request from [[User:UpsandDowns1234|UpsandDowns1234]]
fix comment/last not working on user/usertalk pages
categorize pages where type=section [[Category:Inactive project page sections]]
remove "|section=", which was boldly added on 15 June 2016‎, is not documented, and is not used anywhere – this template populates [[Category:Inactive project pages]], not page-sections.
the date alias for last was only in the top half
add param. aliases that people may expect through familiarity with other templates about deprecation or closure
add database report option per tper
Add __EXPECTUNUSEDTEMPLATE__ to exclude Template-space pages from [[Special:UnusedTemplates]] (see Tech News: 2024-36)
per edit request on talk page - include line break
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Historical here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
